hooks.description: Auto-format any edited file with Biome

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
hooks.description: Run TypeScript typecheck after any TS edit, show last 20 lines of output

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env files must not be created or modified by Claude. Add values to .env.example instead.' && exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|prisma migrate reset|git push --force)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: dangerous command detected. Ask the user to run this manually.' && exit 2; fi

hooks.description: Surface any remaining TS errors before Claude stops
